---
title: "About this blog"
description: |
  Some additional details about the blog
---

This blog is to keeps the mizer community informed of what we are all up to and share our experiences and our best practices.

The blog is for anything related to mizer: new applications, 
new features, technical details, plans and ideas. 
Contributions welcome.

You can find more information about the mizer package on the [mizer home page](https://sizespectrum.org/mizer/).
